microsoft_ft: Oversaw an **end-to-end resilience program** for Azure, defining success metrics and monitoring issues across systems handling **hundreds of thousands of high-value transactions daily**, scaling from a 2-person operation into a platformized system driving $14M+ business impact.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements, SQL-backed metrics, and self-service scheduling that **reduced operational toil 30%** and transitioned execution to a scalable Agile, self-service model across the full SDLC.

Partnered with external customers (**Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp**), account managers, and engineers to define, build, test, and release integrations and supporting features, consulting partners on best practices for data passing and API design.

Directed **14 cross-functional recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, articulating risk and strategy to engineering and leadership stakeholders.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months at a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable model for continuous validation across enterprise systems.

Scaled team leverage through AI-driven automation, building an internal AI agent and restructuring Kanban planning workflows to **reduce planning cycle time 39%** and increase drill capacity 21% while managing backlogs across cross-functional teams.
microsoft_2023: Championed product adoption for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across **14 key teams** and saved **37 engineering hours monthly**, collaborating closely with engineers and non-technical stakeholders.

Influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, applying exceptional analytical skills to identify and prioritize critical feature gaps amid ambiguity.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, **cutting lookup time 83%** and improving JSON-structured knowledge access for engineering partners.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions **28% faster** by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ teams, mirroring program-management coordination across complex stakeholder groups.

Mobilized a product strategy to mitigate operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with **20+ service teams** to identify 81 hours of manual effort per region, then built and socialized a roadmap to automate critical paths.

Enabled leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact support by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** with SQL-backed metrics to track operational toil and surface opportunities across 140+ cross-functional teams.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across **1,200+ stations**, paying careful attention to detail while problem-solving under ambiguity.

Facilitated **Agile ceremonies** including sprint planning and retrospectives, managing the backlog and Kanban workflow to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across the complete SDLC.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering teams to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle 25% by translating technical tradeoffs for non-technical stakeholders.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings **26%** by optimizing operations and managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for **200+ monthly proposals** via a new CRM process, coordinating cross-functional sales and operations workflows.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost **13%** and boosted conversions 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, applying analytical rigor to optimize the website and Google profile against measurable success metrics.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying and sealing margin leaks to surface data-driven opportunities for executive decision-makers.

tailoring_notes: Mirrored JD vocabulary: end-to-end program, success metrics, high-value transactions/day, API integrations, data passing, backlog/Kanban, SDLC, Agile.
Surfaced SQL, JSON, Web APIs, Atlassian Suite, and external-partner consulting to match hard requirements.
Led with strong action verbs and emphasized cross-team work with engineers, account managers, and external customers.
